Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT up.upgrade, count(*) AS change FROM comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS up JOIN comstock_amy2018_r2_2025_md_agg_by_state_and_county_parquet AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = up.bldg_id AND bs.county = up.county AND bs.state = up.state AND bs.upgrade = 0 WHERE bs.applicability = true AND up.applicability = true AND up.upgrade != 0 AND true GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/76a31e6778fb94735cfebf814bf9fb8208b62c16229152e27051e26bb4a30e8a/a2c856fb-1e40-4666-ad0e-d8dcf92d58c9/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
